rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §30.051, which governs the purpose and services of the Texas School for the Deaf. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 30.051. PURPOSE OF TEXAS SCHOOL FOR THE DEAF.
_note: Rule text concerns the Texas School for the Deaf and is unrelated to homestead exemptions or property tax.
